behavioral_equivalence.detail: no behavioral verification exists in this MVP; structural checks do not prove a resumed model behaves equivalently

exact_content_preserved_in_resume.detail: every rendered EXACT record appears byte-for-byte

known_omissions.detail: 2 known omission(s) recorded — material exists that was not compiled into typed records

record_reference_integrity.detail: every per-record source span re-hashes to its recorded hash

superseded_not_rendered_as_active.detail: no SUPERSEDED or EXPIRED record is rendered as current

supersession_links_consistent.detail: supersession links are acyclic and resolve

note: verdict covers deterministic structure only; it is not a claim of behavioral equivalence or net token savings
